creator: tw.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
When I install mailgraph, two line message show on -
	rrdtool-1.2.15: "/usr/ports/graphics/libart_lgpl" non-existent 
        mailgraph-1.12_1: "/usr/ports/graphics/libart_lgpl" non-existent

        but now libart_lgpl already change path to libart_lgpl2

Fix: 

If the pkg maintainer can fix the dependency?
